Exhibition Room

Leaves

Foliage as the subject itself — decorative pattern, rodgersia and cordyline forms studied close, where color and line take the place of bloom.

No. 10-1
Decorative Leaves I
Nona Dronova · 2023 · Oil on canvas

Nona Dronova · 2023 · Oil on canvas

Nona Dronova · 2024 · Oil on canvas
No. 10-5
Rodgersia Leaves
Nona Dronova · Oil on canvas
